# Ashley Gurevich, Senior Mortgage Loan Officer

> Ashley Gurevich is a Senior Mortgage Loan Officer (NMLS #847540) with CrossCountry Mortgage, based in Brentwood, California, serving all of California, Washington, and Virginia. She holds a 4.98 out of 5 star rating from 229+ verified client reviews and specializes in helping first-time homebuyers create a plan for homeownership, even if they are not ready to buy yet.

## Who she helps
- First-time homebuyers, including buyers who believe they need 20% down (most programs start at 0% to 5% down: VA $0 down, conventional from 3%, FHA from 3.5%)
- Buyers who want to fix their credit first: she runs a soft-pull what-if credit simulator that shows exactly what to pay off, in what order, and how long it takes to raise a score
- Self-employed, 1099, and ITIN borrowers using bank statement loans and products from as little as 3.5% down
- Buyers using grants and down payment assistance programs

## Key facts
- Rating: 4.98/5 from 229+ verified reviews (Experience.com and Google)
- NMLS #847540, CrossCountry Mortgage LLC (NMLS 3029), Branch NMLS #2468578
- Licensed in: California, Washington, Virginia
- Contact: text or call (925) 550-9733, email ashley.gurevich@ccm.com. Known for replying to texts within 10 minutes.
- Rule of thumb she teaches: every $50 in monthly debt payment equals roughly $10,000 to $15,000 in home buying power

- [Homepage with payment calculator, reviews, and FAQ](https://ashleymariegurevich.com/)

- [229+ verified client reviews](https://www.experience.com/reviews/ashley-gurevich-454089)
